case_title: LISA RUSSELL VS. PRISTINE SUN FUND 5, LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUSSELL, LISA AS TO DEFENDANT PRISTINE SUN FUND 5, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUSSELL, LISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRISTINE SUN FUND 5, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $21,049.92 PRINCIPAL, $850.07 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,269.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
